  [Submitted on 28 May 2024 ( v1 ), last revised 14 Jun 2024 (this version, v2)] 
     Title: Defending Large Language Models Against Jailbreak Attacks via Layer-specific Editing 
     Authors: Wei Zhao ,  Zhe Li ,  Yige Li ,  Ye Zhang ,  Jun Sun              View a PDF of the paper titled Defending Large Language Models Against Jailbreak Attacks via Layer-specific Editing, by Wei Zhao and Zhe Li and Yige Li and Ye Zhang and Jun Sun 
     View PDF 
     HTML (experimental) 



     
             Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being adopted in a wide range of real-world applications. Despite their impressive performance, recent studies have shown that LLMs are vulnerable to deliberately crafted adversarial prompts even when aligned via Reinforce
